title: Connecting a Shared inbox to Monday.com
excerpt:

posts.author: ashleyME (Ashley M)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi There!

We typically use our ticketing system to track data and receive requests from clients. However we are looking at revamping one of our processes to incorporate monday.com. The issue we have is that if we need to respond to the client, the email will come from one of our personal emails that is connect to Monday.com, we beleive this might ‘untrain’ our clinets to only send emails to our helpdesk shared inboxes. Is there any way to connect these shared inboxes to Monday.com to send the replies, so they do not see our own email addresses?

Thank you for the help in advance!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ashleyME,

This is actually possible through our Emails and Activities app, if this is of interest to you? The new feature allows shared access to a connected email account and enables you to customise share settings for each team member.

  • https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360019213180-Emails-Activities-on-monday-com#default_sharing

Is this along the lines of what you’re looking for?

posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml: We ended up setting up a BOT email address. But you CAN set up a shared email address if your company does not require SSO/OKTA like ours did. It will require that email address to be a licensed member and the automations need to be set up while you are logged in under that email.

posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml: @BiancaT We desperately need the Emails and Activities but I hear it is for Sales CRM only. We have work OS.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: At this stage this feature is exclusive to our Sales CRM product - I apologise for the setback here! Incase you’re interested, I will leave the feature/pricing page for the product here, monday.com CRM pricing: find the plan that works for you

posts.author: forrestfarmer (WOut Boer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Kate,

have the same challenge. What do you mean with a Bot email address?
Would that be a Google User and email and no actual person connected to it?

Thanks,

Wout

posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Wout -

We are using a “fake” employee MS outlook inbox to send emails. Because we have OKTA we had to assign an employee number and SSO and log into Monday.com with the BOT.

Kate

posts.author: osamahaskari (Osamah Askari)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ashleyME since monday.com does not support this natively, you can however use an app we’ve made called SharedMailer

image2483×1234 180 KB

it is in early access right now and completely free to use, all you have to do is dm me your monday.com company slug (for example if your monday.com account link is “abccompany.monday.com” then “abccompany” is your slug) or email us at hello@osamahaskari.com and we will give your account access to this application.

Sam
